---
name: Bug report
about: Something is broken
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
assignees: othmastar
---

## Summary
A clear one-line description of the bug.

## Environment
- OS: [e.g. Ubuntu 22.04, macOS 14, Windows 11]
- Adam Prism version: [e.g. v1.0.0b1]
- Install method: [e.g. docker compose, pip install, source]
- Python version: [e.g. 3.11.5]
- LLM backend: [e.g. Ollama 0.5.7, OpenAI gpt-4o, Anthropic claude-3]

## Steps to Reproduce
1. `git clone ...`
2. `pip install -e .`
3. `python main.py --port 8000`
4. `curl ...`
5. See error

## Expected Behavior
What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior
What actually happened. Include stack trace if available.

## Logs
```
Paste relevant log output here (api logs, browser console, etc.)
```

## Screenshots
If applicable.

## Severity
- [ ] Critical (system unusable)
- [ ] High (major feature broken)
- [ ] Medium (feature impaired but workaround exists)
- [ ] Low (cosmetic / minor)

## Additional Context
Anything else worth mentioning. Related issues. Cross-references.
